title: Eyeballing the line of best fit
description: Given a random assortment of points, draw a line of best fit through them.
topic_path: Eyeballing the line of best fit

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which line fits the data graphed below?**

[[☃ radio 2]]

[[☃ image 1]]
hints: A line of fit goes through the middle of the data points.
Line $\goldD{\text{B}}$ fits the data.

options.alt: A scatterplot on the x y axis where x and y scale by 1. Points rise diagonally in a narrow scatter between (1, 2) and (9, 9). A line labeled A increases diagonally extending from (0, 4) through (8, 10). A line labeled B increases diagonally extending from (0, 2) through (8, 8). A line labeled C increases diagonally extending from (0, 4) through (10, 5). All values are estimated.

choices.content: None of the lines fit the data.
